event: 37.6 weeks of gestation based on the date of last menstruation
fetal heart rate of 143 beats per minute
posterior body placenta maturation grade III
without the need for uterotonic agents
placenta came out with Schultze mechanism
maneuvers for manual reinversion were performed
decided to perform an exploratory laparotomy
no response to Hayman hemostatic suture
bilateral ligation of the anterior trunk of the hypogastric artery performed
2 bags of packed red blood cells transfused
uterus regained tone in approximately 5 minutes
transferred to the medical intensive care unit
did not need admission to the intensive care unit
